testcase.name: test_explore_idea_returns_200

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: <!DOCTYPE html> <!--[if lt IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie6 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie7 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 8]> <html class="no-js ie8 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if gt IE 8]><!--> <html class="no-js" lang="en-US"> <!--<![endif]--> <head>
<title>preview.emergentagent.com | 502: Bad gateway</title> <meta charset="UTF-8" /> <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8" /> <meta http-equiv="X-UA assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_fallback_endpoints.py:31: in test_explore_idea_returns_200 assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: <!DOCTYPE html> E <!--[if lt IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie6 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie7 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if IE 8]> <html class="no-js ie8 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if gt IE 8]><!--> <html class="no-js" lang="en-US"> <!--<![endif]--> E <head> E E <title>preview.emergentagent.com | 502: Bad gateway</title> E <meta charset="UTF-8" /> E <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8" /> E <meta http-equiv="X-UA E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
